calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Richard B. Cole as receiver granted. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
